premise: A haunted sextant leads a disgraced captain on a desperate hunt for a lost city, unleashing a vengeful sea and shattering loyalties.

quests.title: The Serpent's Eye
quests.synopsis: Captain Elias Thorne seeks the Sunken City of Aethelgard, guided by a cursed sextant.

locations.name: Heatherfall
locations.description: Low fog hangs over the roofs, and the villagers speak more softly than usual.

locations.name: Old Well
locations.description: The stone ring of the well trembles as if someone below is striking metal.

locations.name: Ancestor Shrine
locations.description: The shrine walls carry the carved names of those who once sealed the mine.

locations.name: Root Chapel
locations.description: A small chapel under the roots, where miners once left offerings before descending.

items.name: Rusted Medallion
items.description: The mark of the first bellkeeper, cold even in a warm hand.

items.name: Silver Knife
items.description: A plain blade for cutting shadows, hidden in the shrine.

items.name: Healing Salve
items.description: A miner's salve made from pale moss and ash-salt. It can close a fresh wound.

npcs.name: Elder Mira
npcs.description: The last villager who remembers the night the bell fell silent.

dialogues.text: If the well sings with ash, seek the bellkeeper's medallion.

steps.dialogue: If the well sings with ash, seek the bellkeeper's medallion.
steps.narration: Mira recognizes the hero and points toward the first wound in the earth.
The path to the well is overgrown with pale heather.
The medallion loosens from the wet stone and falls silent in the hero's hand.
A trail of ash leads toward the shrine.
The blade answers the medallion with a clean flash of light.

hidden_routes.narration: The medallion warms in the hero's hand, and roots pull aside to reveal a narrow chapel path.

quests.title: Echoes of Aethelgard
quests.synopsis: Aethelgard’s restless spirits manifest, twisting the crew’s minds and fueling a bloody mutiny.

locations.name: Ancestor Shrine
locations.description: Silver dust rests on the threshold like an unfinished prayer.

locations.name: Cartographer's Hut
locations.description: Maps hang from the rafters, stirred by a draft from the mine.

locations.name: Mine Gate
locations.description: Rusted bars bear the palm mark of the old bellkeeper.

locations.name: Black Adit
locations.description: The tunnel beyond the gate breathes cold air and old smoke.

items.name: Vein Map
items.description: The map shows the path toward the mine's buried heart.

items.name: Bellkeeper Key
items.description: A key shaped like the clapper of a small bell.

items.name: Rusted Medallion
items.description: The first bellkeeper's sign, recovered from the old well.

items.name: Bruisewort Tonic
items.description: A bitter field tonic that steadies the breath and dulls pain after a fight.

npcs.name: Iren the Cartographer
npcs.description: She does not trust heroes, but she trusts old signs.

dialogues.text: Show me the bellkeeper's sign, and I will give you the true vein map.
That is enough. Go to the gate before the shadow learns your name.

enemies.name: Oathbound Guard
enemies.description: A silent guard sworn to protect Iren's maps from desperate hands.

steps.narration: The hero carries the medallion to the only person who knows the old shafts.

steps.dialogue: That is enough. Go to the gate before the shadow learns your name.
steps.narration: The cartographer accepts the medallion as proof and opens a hidden map case.
The map unrolls by itself and points toward the mine gate.
The road to the mine threshold smells of wet iron.
The key waits beneath a stone marked with the map's symbol.
The gate opens without a creak, as if afraid to wake what waits below.
The hero crosses the threshold and leaves daylight behind.

provocations.narration: Pressed too hard, Iren snaps her map case shut and signals the oathbound guard.

objects.name: Bellkeeper Gate
objects.description: A locked passage controlled by the locked-gate predicate.

expected_plan: (unlock bellkeeper-gate bellkeeper-key mine-gate black-adit quest-2-s5 quest-2-s6)
verified_plan: (unlock bellkeeper-gate bellkeeper-key mine-gate black-adit quest-2-s5 quest-2-s6)

quests.title: The Deep's Requiem
quests.synopsis: Elias, confronting his past and the sea’s fury, must choose between salvation and oblivion.

locations.name: Black Adit
locations.description: Ash glows inside the tunnel walls, arranging itself into old faces.

locations.name: Bell Hall
locations.description: A vast bell hangs over a crack in the stone, though no tower was ever built here.

locations.name: Mine Core
locations.description: The deepest chamber is silent, but the silence presses against the bones.

locations.name: Memorial Alcove
locations.description: Names of forgotten miners shimmer here whenever the bell heart is raised.

items.name: Silver Knife
items.description: The shrine blade, now darker along the edge.

items.name: Bell Heart
items.description: A warm shard of metal that beats like a living heart.

items.name: Memory Charm
items.description: A charm woven from wire and soot-black thread, warm with remembered voices.

npcs.name: Bellkeeper's Shade
npcs.description: Not an enemy, but a memory of guilt.

dialogues.text: Do not break the bell. Return its heart where the earth still remembers silence.

enemies.name: Ash Guardian
enemies.description: Armor filled with hot dust and the anger of lost miners.

steps.narration: Each step toward the hall calls up the bell's distant toll.
The silver knife cuts through the dust, and the guardian collapses into ash.

steps.dialogue: Do not break the bell. Return its heart where the earth still remembers silence.
steps.narration: The bellkeeper's shade separates grief from rage.
The bell heart burns hot, but it does not harm the hero.
The deepest road passes through a tunnel without echoes.
The rite of silence seals the crack, and for the first time in years the village hears true wind.

hidden_routes.narration: The bell heart answers the names in the stone, and a memorial alcove opens behind the hanging bell.

twist: The city wasn't lost, but deliberately sunk by Elias's own ancestor, a king seeking to erase a terrible prophecy.

llm_compact_draft.premise: A haunted sextant leads a disgraced captain on a desperate hunt for a lost city, unleashing a vengeful sea and shattering loyalties.
quest_summaries: Captain Elias Thorne seeks the Sunken City of Aethelgard, guided by a cursed sextant.
Aethelgard’s restless spirits manifest, twisting the crew’s minds and fueling a bloody mutiny.
Elias, confronting his past and the sea’s fury, must choose between salvation and oblivion.
llm_compact_draft.twist: The city wasn't lost, but deliberately sunk by Elias's own ancestor, a king seeking to erase a terrible prophecy.
